note: Recorded output of the triage agent (Haiku 4.5) over fixtures/ria_remediation_plan.json, so the demo replays authoring-time judgment without an API key. The live path is: python main.py triage fixtures/ria_remediation_plan.json

decisions.action: Update the provider registration SOP to reflect the revised CMS enrollment screening requirements
decisions.rationale: Document revision work; correctness is editorial judgment, not a machine-checkable system state.

decisions.action: Enforce an idle session timeout of 15 minutes or less on the provider portal
decisions.rationale: Session timeout is a configuration value with a numeric bound; verifiable against portal security config.

decisions.action: Set audit log retention to at least 180 days with delivery to the SIEM
decisions.rationale: Retention period and destination are configuration values; verifiable against logging config.

decisions.action: Verify encryption at rest is enabled for the patient records store with quarterly key rotation
decisions.rationale: Encryption flag, algorithm, and rotation cadence are machine-readable datastore configuration.

decisions.action: Train intake and scheduling teams on the revised patient consent workflow
decisions.rationale: Training completion lives in an LMS and attendance records; out of scope for the configured evidence adapters.
